run_summary.summary:
Two substantive things happened today on existing deals. JLab switched their payment platform to Tipalti — Liz got the invite this morning and completed registration by 9:15 AM. Critical change: invoices to JLab must now go to apinvoice@jlab.com (PDF/JPG/PNG only). Please update your contacts/invoice workflow for JLab. On Whisker, Cheyenne reached out this morning about preferred payment method and Liz confirmed ACH works — this strongly suggests Whisker is processing payment. Keep an eye on your bank/email for a payment confirmation.

Separately: Shabebe and Black Diamond Coatings deal creates from Liz's pitches earlier today should already be in the queue from the previous run.

suggestions.message: JLab has moved to Tipalti for payments. Liz completed registration today. Going forward all invoices go to apinvoice@jlab.com — update your invoice workflow! Old contact method may no longer work.
Cheyenne asked Liz about payment method this morning and Liz said ACH works. Payment appears to be in progress — watch for a deposit or payment confirmation email.

deals.notes: [Apr 27]: JLab switched to Tipalti as their payment platform. Liz received invite at 8:50 AM and completed registration by 9:15 AM. IMPORTANT: All future invoices must be sent to apinvoice@jlab.com (PDF, JPG, or PNG format only). Payment portal: suppliers.tipalti.com/jlab. Two payment details update confirmations followed at 9:17 AM and 9:23 AM.
deals.activity_note: Apr 27: JLab moved to Tipalti payment system. Liz registered and completed setup. New invoice address: apinvoice@jlab.com — update invoice workflow.

deals.notes: [Apr 27]: Cheyenne (cmabey@whisker.com) emailed Liz asking about preferred payment method. Liz replied: 'ACH would be great, but either works. Thank you!' Indicates Whisker is actively processing payment.
deals.activity_note: Apr 27: Cheyenne confirmed payment method with Liz — ACH preferred. Payment appears to be in progress.
